name: PortKit Project Dashboard
description: The original starter demo: an agent that generates a live project dashboard (KPI cards, sprint progress, per-project drill-downs), plus flight-search and to-do surfaces — every UI streamed down the wire as A2UI v0.9 envelopes. Archived from the host `/` route during the pdf-analyst default swap; the frontend now lives under other-examples/portkit/ and is not mounted in the host app.
